mapper.select: select ufp.id, ufp.user_id, ufp.program_id, ufp.note, ufp.created_at, p.program_code, p.program_name, p.study_mode, p.degree_type, s.id as school_id, s.name as school_name, s.province, s.tier as school_tier, s.is_985, s.is_211, s.is_double_first, c.name as college_name, sc.score_line, sc.year as data_year, ar.min_admitted_score, ar.avg_admitted_score, ar.max_admitted_score from user_favorite_program ufp join program p on p.id = ufp.program_id join college c on c.id = p.college_id join school s on s.id = c.school_id left join admission_score sc on sc.program_id = p.id and sc.year = (select max(sc2.year) from admission_score sc2 where sc2.program_id = p.id and sc2.score_line is not null) left join admission_result ar on ar.program_id = p.id and ar.year = sc.year where ufp.user_id = #{userId} order by ufp.created_at desc
select count(1) from user_favorite_program where user_id = #{userId} and program_id = #{programId}
mapper.insert: insert into user_favorite_program( user_id, program_id, note, created_at, updated_at )values( #{userId}, #{programId}, #{note}, sysdate(), sysdate() )
mapper.delete: delete from user_favorite_program where user_id = #{userId} and program_id = #{programId}
